title: Welcome to the KAXA Blog
text:
This blog shares practical space engineering content, community updates, and learning resources for students and professionals in Cambodia.
Expect upcoming posts on:

Space mission explainers
Student pathways in engineering
Tools and skills for aerospace learning
News and event highlights from KAXA

title: About Us
text:
Why This Matters
KAXA aims to promotes public understanding of space technologies and strengthens the local pipeline of future engineers, researchers, and innovators.



Vision
A Cambodia where young people see natural science, aerospace, and space technology as an achievable path.


Approach
Bridge inspiration and practical education through consistent content and events.


Partnerships
Collaborate with universities, labs, and international professionals to scale impact.



Our Global Members Map
Click any pin to view member profile details.

title: How Orbits Work: A Beginner Guide
text:
This learning article explains orbit fundamentals in simple steps:

Gravity and forward velocity
Low Earth orbit vs higher orbits
Why satellites do not immediately fall back to Earth

Use this as a starter before exploring mission planning and satellite operations.
